expectations.text: detects-auth-untested: Report flags that auth.ts has no corresponding test file
expectations.evidence: 'Critical gap: auth.ts has zero tests' — section heading, identifies both checkPermission and revokeSession as untested.

expectations.text: classifies-auth-as-p1: Missing auth tests classified as P1/Critical
expectations.evidence: Uses 'Critical gap' as section heading and 'Risk: HIGH (security)' in summary table.

expectations.text: identifies-weak-assertions: Report flags toBeTruthy or toBeDefined as weak/insufficient
expectations.evidence: Explicitly quotes 'toBeTruthy() — passes for any non-null object' and 'toBeDefined()'.

expectations.text: identifies-missing-mock: Report identifies stripe client is not mocked
expectations.evidence: Mentions '(would need a mock)' for failure branch; references stripe client in summary table.

expectations.text: writes-plan-file: Agent writes a plan file to plans/ as specified by the skill
expectations.evidence: No plan file written. Agent saved report to response.txt only — no plans/ directory mentioned.
